channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.20 (Build 20260309)
item.description:
What's New

fix: detect repeated vowels using raw keystroke sequence & fix test input method

  • checkSpelling: count consecutive identical vowel keystrokes from

buffer.getKeystrokeSequence() instead of buffer entries (which are

affected by Telex transforms like o-o→ô). If ≥3 identical vowel

keystrokes detected, reject input (spellingOK=false, tempDisableKey=true).

  • Add/update repeated vowel test cases:

- POOOR → 'poor', BAAAS → 'baas', TEEEF → 'teef' (circumflex undo)

- LUUUS → 'luuus' (no circumflex for u)

- Regression tests: tooi→tôi, người, â still work

  • Fix testDeleteAcrossWordBoundary: split into Telex (using 'click')

and Simple Telex 1 (vInputType=2, using 'world') variants, since

'w' is a horn key in Telex mode.

  • Bump version

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
